# MoedimAI

> MoedimAI turns African smallholder botanicals into verified, traceable, buyer-ready ingredients. Thirteen Kenyan-grown oils, every lot GC-MS or fatty acid profiled, traceable from farm to dispatch. Sold by the bottle and by the kilogram. Headquartered in Mount Kenya with EU operations in Rotterdam and US holding in Delaware.

## For buyers

- [Buyer supply desk](https://www.moedim.ai/buyers.md): MoedimAI for cosmetic, fragrance, and wellness buyers. Thirteen Kenyan botanicals available by the kilogram with full documentation.

## For investors and partners

- [Company thesis](https://www.moedim.ai/thesis.md): Chemotype-verification infrastructure for African organic exports. Three hundred farmers live, three thousand in pipeline, nine crops, 5 to 10 tonnes per day of processing capacity once the second distillation partner is online.

## For farmers

- [Jaribu by MoedimAI](https://www.moedim.ai/jaribu.md): Above-market prices for biomass, organic input support, and a path to certified export markets.

- [Farmer Intake](https://intake.moedim.ai/intake): Public farmer intake form hosted separately from the marketing website and platform app.

## Contact

info@moedim.ai
